item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":true,"pressure_present":true,"confidence":0.96,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"报销票据缺章，单据前加人工核对"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"预算码填错，审批前增二审"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"审批人漏选，流转前挂复核岗"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"今天合同编号出错，请在入口放核验人"},{"role":"assistant","turn_index":1,"span":"连续几次处理方式都是：某类差错出现后，就在相邻流转点前新增人工关卡或复核角色。"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"财务会下午就开，流程调整先放一边；今天只需要把这个核验人补上。"}],"abstain_reason":""}
